<!-- Inspired by: https://github.com/github/awesome-copilot/blob/main/instructions/localization.instructions.md -->
---
applyTo: "src/data/**,src/pages/**,src/components/**"
description: "Bilingual (ES/EN) content and routing rules for the InnovaAI site"
---

# i18n Guidelines

Apply the repository-wide guidance from `../copilot-instructions.md` to all content work.

## Routing and locales

- Astro native i18n is enabled with `defaultLocale: 'es'`, `locales: ['es','en']`, `prefixDefaultLocale: true`
- Every public URL is prefixed: `/es/...` for Spanish, `/en/...` for English. The root `/` redirects to `/es/`
- The DiarioMed sub-landing lives at `/es/diariomed/` and is currently Spanish-only

## Content files

- All user-facing copy lives in `src/data/es/*.ts` or `src/data/en/*.ts`; never hardcode strings inside components or pages
- Files are mirrored by name and export shape: `src/data/es/hero.ts` must have an `src/data/en/hero.ts` twin with the exact same keys and type signature
- **Exception**: `src/data/es/diariomed.ts` has no English twin yet — do not assume parity for that file until the sub-landing is translated
- Share the canonical type for a bundle (e.g. `Service`, `Product`, `FaqItem`) across both locales via `src/data/types.ts`

## Component contract

- Components accept already-translated strings as props; they must never import from `src/data/**` or branch on `Astro.currentLocale`
- The page (under `src/pages/{locale}/`) is the only place allowed to select the right data bundle and pass it down

## Brand voice

- Spanish is the primary brand voice; write ES first, then adapt to EN. Keep copy concise, direct, and free of jargon unless the jargon is itself a product feature
- Never use emoji. Visual accents come from Lucide icons and the Neural Green palette

## Adding a new locale or section

- When introducing a new data bundle, add ES and EN files together in the same change with identical keys
- When introducing a new locale (future work), update `astro.config.mjs`, `Layout.astro` hreflang tags, and every `src/data/<locale>/*.ts` file in one pass
